Bracers of the Reverent  
 


Slot: WRIST
AC: 9
WIS: +5
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR
Race: ALL except BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Bracers of the Reverent

Slot: WRIST
AC: 9
WIS: +5
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR
Race: ALL except BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):255, 220, 130
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:12 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:505
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-02 10:34:17
Page Updated:Mon Apr 10th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 30
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Bracers of the Reverent

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Solusek Ro


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Bad economy can be a good thing
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2002 at 10:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591746830688
View User Forum
Scholar
119 posts
I love Tunare's derpressed economy. Just picked up a pair of these in the Bazaar. Total cost: 225pp. Less than the cost of buying the plat bars for just one bracer (with a 45 cha, at any rate).
▲ Page top
RE: Bad economy can be a good thing
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2002 at 1:11 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Get your charisma up (buy a pair of the 25 cha steins, and a few other items to get charisma up to the 120ish range. pricess seem to bottom out around there.

With high CHA 2 plat bars = 210pp

Not that 225 isn't a good deal, that's paying someone 15pp to do the quest :D

▲ Page top
RE: Bad economy can be a good thing
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2002 at 2:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591746830688
View User Forum
Scholar
119 posts
That's 225pp for a PAIR of bracers. That would require purchasing 4 bars of plat (420 pp with high cha). So buying the bracers outright saved me 200pp. :D

I think they were being sold by high lvl clerics that had upgraded and were getting rid of their old items for cheap. I've done that at times.

Edited, Mon Oct 28 14:30:37 2002
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 18 2002 at 7:37 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
MAKE SURE !!!
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2002 at 9:15 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591773008094
Scholar
17 posts
When you get to NK, make sure that Regis is not already spawned. I learned this the hardway. He spawns a bit up a hill, so no one may see him; whereas Zahal roams, so people may kill him and make Regis pop. I found the easiest thing to do, is goto Regis' loc first. If he is not there...bind if you like. Then go camp Zahal, kill him, gate, and crush Regis.
▲ Page top
twinkies
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2001 at 12:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766091777
View User Forum
31 posts
i no longer play a cleric, but these are still a great item for the midseason cleric

Edited, Sat Mar 29 21:12:31 2003
▲ Page top
Very Nice
QuoteReply
# Oct 31 2001 at 1:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
These bracers are the crown jewel of the Sol Ro Cleric Quest armor. All the wisdom in the armor is in the bracers. +10 wis for the pair. Quest is pretty easy. Help killing Zahal/Regis is easy to find, just ask a few high levels in the zone. then get a sow and lev, and run to rathe mtn. Get the second peice from the gypsy and than its just a trip to sol ro (after you find an enchanter to ench. the plat). Way easier to get yourself than chipped bone bracelets, and more than double the ac. with 85 charisma and ally faction to merchants, plat cost me 112 per bar. Both bracers cost 448 to quest, about the price of 1 chipped bone bracelet. Too sweet.
▲ Page top
RE: Very Nice
QuoteReply
# Oct 31 2001 at 9:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750012638
View User Forum
Sage
137 posts
They are in game for a long time now and the price droped rapidly. You can get one for about 400pp in EC on Bertoxx, 300pp if your lucky. Nice item for a cleric.
▲ Page top
RE: Very Nice
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2001 at 12:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Yes, but my point was, why buy them. cost me 448 to quest both. Now that I've purchased a few basic charisma items, it would have been 420. So if the lucky price is 300 each, 600 per pair, go kill regis, and quest yourself. Repeat. Set for 400+, not 600-800. Then if you get bored, sell them, repeat, and pocket the profit.

Edited, Sun Dec 9 00:47:59 2001
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 27 2001 at 9:16 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i frined told me not to do this quest because it was disabled could someone tell me the facts? i was reallly looking forward to the 5wisdom and there not lore soo... i cna get two!
RE: rumer?
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 8:17 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361532627
View User Forum
54 posts
This quest has not been disabled. I helped my wife do this last night to her cleric's first set. Gonna go tonight and try to get her a second. Nice items with decent AC and wis.
▲ Page top
my 2cp
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2001 at 2:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755922495
5 posts
For the druid asking for these I hope your buying for your alt cleric character since they are Cleric only.
The Wis and AC is pretty good especially for only 250pp. I have a dwarven cleric with cha 45, in my home town the plat bar cost 125 thus 250 since you need 2 for each bracer. Had I asked my ranger freind to buy them it would have cost a 100pp a bar, so 200 for both.
If an enchater asks for a donation to enchant your bar plz move on. There are many freindly enchanters who will gladly enchant for free. (always donate for a clarity though)
The hardest part of this quest is finding an enchanter thats close to where you are, especially since he must be 34/39 lvl not sure which.
As for the killing it is very easy. Zahal practiclly kills himself, but if you want xp he pops near the druid camp, get to him before the druids do. I got xp by blasting him whiile the druids tanked him. (yes I got the last shot) Regis will pop in the north, with sense heading he is easy to find. He hides in the woods so he maybe a little hard to spot from the distance, but hes up there.
The 1st time I killed him I called out for help and a few high lvl ppl came to my aid. After I loaded them with buffs for helping they summarily sluaghtered him. The 2nd time I was with a ranger friend and we were a bit more experienced, we slayed him in seconds.
I never once camped him. I always chk to see if either one is up every time I pass thru North Karna. Plz if you see Regis is up, go to his location but chk to see if someone else is camping him. Shout to see if anyone recently kiled Zahal, they may just be on their way to him and it would stink if you stole what they started.
▲ Page top
oh hay

and the chiped bone bracer's is 4ac and 5 wis

#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 20 2001 at 4:22 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) These bracers sell for no more than 300pp each now so if you are selling it for this price you will never get them sold.........
